text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I got caught up in Gold Ship's quest
to find Eden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I somehow still managed to get her ready for her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I'm worried about anything right now, it's about
how Gold Ship is feeling. She, however...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, good job! Yes, come on! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now it's just a matter of when to shake! D'aww, I
just can't stop watching!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm watching that chihuahua over there through
this stick of chikuwa.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There are some things that are only
comprehensible when seen through the small hole
of a chikuwa.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That chihuahua must be thinking hard about the
best time to hold out its paw for a shake, no
doubt.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's the same focus we Umamusume have when
we're thinking about the best time to make our
move during a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her comparison is hard to follow, but I guess
Gold Ship must be thinking about the next race...
in her own unique way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What?! Why is it lying down now of all times?!
That was obviously the moment to do a paw
shake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I just have to pray she gives it her all
out on the racecourse!
